patch.value: Claude Code plugin install spec drift: README says pm-cli@pm but plugin name is pm-claude

Marketplace name is 'pm' and the only plugin entry is 'pm-claude' (marketplace.json + .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, identical copies; plugins/pm-claude/.claude-plugin/plugin.json name=pm-claude). Install spec format is <plugin>@<marketplace>, so the canonical spec is '/plugin install pm-claude@pm' as documented in docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md:57. But README.md:51 and plugins/pm-claude/README.md:21 say '/plugin install pm-cli@pm' (plugin 'pm-cli' does not exist in the marketplace), and plugins/pm-claude/README.md:37 says '/plugin install pm-cli@pm-cli' claiming 'Both pm and pm-cli marketplace IDs resolve to the same plugin' — no 'pm-cli' marketplace name exists in tracked metadata. Users following README install instructions may get plugin-not-found. Fix: align all three to pm-claude@pm (or add a real alias and document it).

value.note: remove nonexistent pm-cli plugin alias and document canonical plugin/marketplace names
align Claude plugin install spec with pm-claude@pm

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-agent
value.text: Evidence: docs gates and plugin smoke passed after install-spec correction: pnpm quality:docs-skills, pnpm quality:docs-links, node scripts/smoke-claude-plugin.mjs.

patch.value: Aligned Claude plugin install docs to the real pm-claude@pm plugin/marketplace spec; docs gates and plugin smoke passed.
Corrected Claude plugin install documentation to use pm-claude@pm.
Users can copy the documented plugin install spec and match the actual marketplace/plugin metadata.
README and plugin README now document pm-claude@pm; docs gates and Claude plugin smoke passed.
